title: Monkey D. Luffy
desc: Captain of the Straw Hat Pirates. Ate the Gum-Gum Fruit making his body rubber. Dreams of becoming King of the Pirates.

title: Roronoa Zoro
desc: Swordsman of the Straw Hat Pirates. Wields three swords simultaneously. Aims to become the world's greatest swordsman.

title: Nami
desc: Navigator of the Straw Hat Pirates. Expert in cartography and meteorology. Dreams of drawing a complete map of the world.

title: Usopp
desc: Sniper of the Straw Hat Pirates. Known for his long nose and tall tales. Dreams of becoming a brave warrior of the sea.

title: Sanji
desc: Cook of the Straw Hat Pirates. Master of kick-based combat. Dreams of finding the All Blue, a sea with all fish species.

title: Tony Tony Chopper
desc: Doctor of the Straw Hat Pirates. A reindeer who ate the Human-Human Fruit. Dreams of becoming a doctor who cures any disease.

title: Nico Robin
desc: Archaeologist of the Straw Hat Pirates. Ate the Flower-Flower Fruit. Seeks the true history of the Void Century.

title: Franky
desc: Shipwright of the Straw Hat Pirates. A cyborg who built the Thousand Sunny. Dreams of sailing his ship to the end of the world.

title: Brook
desc: Musician of the Straw Hat Pirates. A living skeleton who ate the Revive-Revive Fruit. Dreams of reuniting with Laboon.

title: Jinbe
desc: Helmsman of the Straw Hat Pirates. A whale shark Fish-Man and former Warlord. Master of Fish-Man Karate techniques.

title: Shanks
desc: Captain of the Red Hair Pirates and one of the Four Emperors. Gave Luffy his straw hat. Incredibly powerful Haki user.

title: Portgas D. Ace
desc: Former second division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates. Luffy's adopted brother. Wielded the Flame-Flame Fruit.

title: Trafalgar Law
desc: Captain of the Heart Pirates and former Warlord. Ate the Op-Op Fruit granting surgical powers over a territory.

title: Boa Hancock
desc: Captain of the Kuja Pirates and former Warlord. Ate the Love-Love Fruit. Known as the most beautiful woman in the world.

title: Edward Newgate
desc: Known as Whitebeard, formerly the strongest man in the world. Captain of the Whitebeard Pirates and an Emperor of the Sea.

title: Marshall D. Teach
desc: Known as Blackbeard, one of the Four Emperors. Uniquely wields two Devil Fruits. Betrayed Whitebeard and killed Thatch.

title: Dracule Mihawk
desc: The greatest swordsman in the world. Former Warlord of the Sea. Wields the black blade Yoru. Zoro's ultimate rival.

title: Silvers Rayleigh
desc: The Dark King and former first mate of the Roger Pirates. Luffy's Haki mentor. One of the most powerful figures alive.

title: Gol D. Roger
desc: The Pirate King who conquered the Grand Line. His last words sparked the Great Age of Pirates. Father of Portgas D. Ace.

title: Monkey D. Garp
desc: Marine Vice Admiral and legendary hero. Luffy and Ace's grandfather. One of the strongest Marines in history.

title: Sengoku
desc: Former Fleet Admiral of the Marines. Ate the Human-Human Fruit Model Buddha. Known as Sengoku the Buddha.

title: Aokiji Kuzan
desc: Former Marine Admiral who ate the Ice-Ice Fruit. Resigned after losing to Akainu. Later allied with Blackbeard Pirates.

title: Akainu Sakazuki
desc: Current Fleet Admiral of the Marines. Ate the Magma-Magma Fruit. Known for his extreme absolute justice doctrine.

title: Kizaru Borsalino
desc: Marine Admiral who ate the Glint-Glint Fruit. Moves and attacks at the speed of light. Laid-back but extremely dangerous.

title: Fujitora Issho
desc: Marine Admiral who ate the Gravity-Gravity Fruit. A blind swordsman with a strong sense of true justice.

title: Donquixote Doflamingo
desc: Former King of Dressrosa and Warlord. Ate the String-String Fruit. Former world noble and underworld broker Joker.

title: Crocodile
desc: Former Warlord and leader of Baroque Works. Ate the Sand-Sand Fruit. Attempted to seize control of Alabasta kingdom.

title: Gecko Moria
desc: Former Warlord who ate the Shadow-Shadow Fruit. Operates from Thriller Bark. Uses shadows to create undead soldiers.

title: Bartholomew Kuma
desc: Former Warlord turned Pacifista cyborg. Ate the Paw-Paw Fruit. Secretly a Revolutionary Army officer named Bartholomew.

title: Enel
desc: Self-proclaimed god of Skypiea. Ate the Rumble-Rumble Fruit giving him lightning powers. Highly overconfident in his abilities.

title: Buggy
desc: Captain of the Buggy Pirates. Ate the Chop-Chop Fruit. Former member of the Roger Pirates alongside Shanks.

title: Arlong
desc: Leader of the Arlong Pirates. A sawshark Fish-Man who terrorized Nami's village for years. Defeated by Luffy in East Blue.

title: Don Krieg
desc: Commander of the Krieg Pirates, largest armada in East Blue. Relies on brute force and various weapons in battle.

title: Smoker
desc: Marine Vice Admiral who ate the Smoke-Smoke Fruit. Has relentlessly pursued Luffy since Loguetown. Values true justice.

title: Tashigi
desc: Marine Captain serving under Smoker. Passionate swordswoman who wants to claim all named swords for the Marines.

title: Coby
desc: Luffy's first friend. Rapidly rising Marine officer with strong Observation Haki. Dreams of becoming an Admiral.

title: Helmeppo
desc: Son of former Marine Captain Morgan. Now a capable Marine officer serving alongside Coby under Vice Admiral Garp.

title: Vivi Nefertari
desc: Princess of Alabasta who temporarily joined the Straw Hats to save her kingdom. Honorable and selfless leader.

title: Igaram
desc: Captain of the Alabasta Royal Guard and loyal protector of Princess Vivi. Disguises himself in elaborate ways.

title: Bon Clay
desc: Mr. 2 of Baroque Works. Ate the Clone-Clone Fruit. Incredibly loyal and flamboyant. Sacrificed himself for Luffy twice.

title: Bentham
desc: Another name for Bon Clay, Mr. 2 of Baroque Works. Befriended Luffy and proved his loyalty through great sacrifice.

title: Miss All Sunday
desc: Nico Robin's Baroque Works alias. Served as vice president under Crocodile while secretly pursuing her own goals.

title: Dorry
desc: One of the two giant warriors of Elbaf. Has been dueling his friend Brogy for over a hundred years on Little Garden.

title: Brogy
desc: One of the two giant warriors of Elbaf. Has been dueling his friend Dorry for over a hundred years on Little Garden.

title: Wapol
desc: Former tyrannical king of Drum Island. Ate the Munch-Munch Fruit. Was defeated by Luffy and later built a toy empire.

title: Dalton
desc: Former royal guard of Drum Island. Ate the Ox-Ox Fruit Model Bison. Became the new leader after Wapol was defeated.

title: Dr. Hiriluk
desc: Quack doctor of Drum Island and Chopper's adoptive father. Believed in the power of medicine and hope above all else.

title: Dr. Kureha
desc: The witch doctor of Drum Island and Chopper's teacher. Over 140 years old but fights with incredible power and energy.

title: Pell
desc: Guardian of Alabasta and one of the strongest warriors in the kingdom. Ate the Falcon-Falcon Fruit. Loyal to the royal family.

title: Chaka
desc: Guardian of Alabasta alongside Pell. Ate the Jackal-Jackal Fruit. Deeply devoted to protecting the Nefertari royal family.

title: Whitebeard Pirates
desc: One of the most powerful pirate crews led by Edward Newgate. Treated as a family by their captain who died at Marineford.

title: Marco
desc: First division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates. Ate the Phoenix-Phoenix Fruit granting him blue flame regeneration.

title: Vista
desc: Fifth division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates. A master swordsman who could match Mihawk in brief swordplay.

title: Jozu
desc: Third division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates. Ate the Diamond-Diamond Fruit making his body incredibly hard.

title: Monkey D. Dragon
desc: The most wanted criminal in the world. Leader of the Revolutionary Army. Luffy's father and Garp's son.

title: Sabo
desc: Chief of Staff of the Revolutionary Army. Luffy and Ace's sworn brother. Ate the Flame-Flame Fruit after Ace's death.

title: Ivankov
desc: Commander of the Revolutionary Army's G Army. Ate the Hormone-Hormone Fruit. A flamboyant and powerful ally of Luffy.

title: Koala
desc: Officer of the Revolutionary Army and former slave. Works alongside Sabo. Expert in Fish-Man Karate techniques.

title: Rob Lucci
desc: Former CP9 agent and assassin. Ate the Cat-Cat Fruit Model Leopard. One of the strongest assassins the World Government had.

title: Spandam
desc: Former leader of CP9. Weak but manipulative. Responsible for Robin being declared an enemy of the world years ago.

title: Kaku
desc: Former CP9 agent who ate the Ox-Ox Fruit Model Giraffe. Was a skilled shipwright in Water Seven before his true identity revealed.

title: Jabra
desc: Former CP9 agent who ate the Dog-Dog Fruit Model Wolf. One of the top assassins before being defeated in Enies Lobby.

title: Blueno
desc: Former CP9 agent who ate the Door-Door Fruit. Could create doors in any surface including the air itself.

title: Kalifa
desc: Former CP9 agent who ate the Bubble-Bubble Fruit. Disguised as Iceburg's secretary in Water Seven.

title: Fukurou
desc: Former CP9 agent known for always announcing his opponents' combat power level out loud during battle unnecessarily.

title: Kumadori
desc: Former CP9 agent who uses an ancient martial art called Life Return to control his own body at a cellular level.

title: Iceburg
desc: Mayor of Water Seven and founder of the Galley-La Company. Was Tom the shipwright's apprentice years ago.

title: Tom
desc: Legendary shipwright who built the Oro Jackson for Roger. Mentor of Iceburg and Franky. Died protecting his disciples.

title: Kokoro
desc: Station master of Shift Station in Water Seven. A mermaid who helped guide the Straw Hats to Enies Lobby.

title: Chimney
desc: Kokoro's granddaughter. A young girl who helped the Straw Hats during the Water Seven and Enies Lobby arc.

title: Paulie
desc: Foreman of the Galley-La Company. A skilled shipwright and rope specialist. Decent person despite his gruff exterior.

title: Peeply Lulu
desc: Galley-La Company foreman. A loyal shipwright who helped defend Water Seven during the CP9 incident.

title: Tileston
desc: Galley-La Company foreman. Loyal to Iceburg and helped defend Water Seven alongside the other shipwrights.

title: Hatchan
desc: Octopus Fish-Man and former member of the Arlong Pirates. Redeemed himself by helping coat the Thousand Sunny.

title: Camie
desc: A mermaid who is friends with the Straw Hats. Introduced them to the Fish-Man Island world and Hachi.

title: Pappug
desc: A talking starfish who is Camie's companion. Claims to have invented fashion and is surprisingly wealthy.

title: Duval
desc: Leader of the Flying Fish Riders who initially sought revenge against Sanji but later became a reluctant ally.

title: Sentoumaru
desc: Marine officer and bodyguard to Vegapunk. Commands the Pacifista units. Uses a giant axe in combat effectively.

title: Vegapunk
desc: Genius scientist of the Marines. Created the Pacifista cyborgs and many advanced technologies for the World Government.

title: Kid
desc: Captain of the Kid Pirates and a member of the Worst Generation. Ate the Magnet-Magnet Fruit. Fierce rival of Luffy.

title: Killer
desc: Combatant of the Kid Pirates and Kid's right-hand man. Known as the Massacre Soldier. Wields spinning scythe blades.

title: Hawkins
desc: Captain of the Hawkins Pirates. Ate the Straw-Straw Fruit allowing him to become a giant scarecrow and redirect damage.

title: Drake
desc: Captain of the Drake Pirates. Ate the Allosaurus model Ancient Zoan. Was secretly a Navy SWORD member infiltrating Kaido.

title: Apoo
desc: Captain of the On Air Pirates. Ate the Tone-Tone Fruit allowing him to weaponize music as physical sound attacks.

title: Urouge
desc: Captain of the Fallen Monk Pirates. A monk-like pirate who can convert damage he receives into raw physical strength.

title: Bonney
desc: Captain of the Bonney Pirates. Ate the Age-Age Fruit allowing her to change the age of herself and others freely.

title: Caribou
desc: Captain of the Caribou Pirates. Ate the Swamp-Swamp Fruit. A murderous pirate who briefly followed the Straw Hats.

title: Big Mom
desc: Charlotte Linlin, one of the Four Emperors. Ate the Soul-Soul Fruit. Rules Totto Land with her enormous family crew.

title: Katakuri
desc: Sweet Commander of the Big Mom Pirates. Ate the Mochi-Mochi Fruit. An incredibly powerful fighter with Future Sight Haki.

title: Smoothie
desc: Sweet Commander of the Big Mom Pirates. Ate the Wring-Wring Fruit allowing her to squeeze liquids from anything.

title: Cracker
desc: Sweet Commander of the Big Mom Pirates. Ate the Biscuit-Biscuit Fruit creating nearly indestructible biscuit soldiers.

title: Perospero
desc: Eldest son of Big Mom and the Minister of Candy. Ate the Candy-Candy Fruit and commands the entrance to Whole Cake Island.

title: Kaido
desc: King of the Beasts and one of the Four Emperors. Ate the Fish-Fish Fruit Model Azure Dragon. Strongest creature alive.

title: King
desc: All-Star of the Beasts Pirates. Ate an unknown Zoan Fruit of the Lunarian race. Incredibly powerful and fiercely loyal to Kaido.

title: Queen
desc: All-Star of the Beasts Pirates. Ate the Brachiosaurus Ancient Zoan. A scientist who created the Ice Oni plague virus.

title: Jack
desc: All-Star of the Beasts Pirates known as the Drought. Ate the Mammoth Ancient Zoan. Destroyed Zou in a prolonged assault.

title: Yamato
desc: Kaido's son who idolizes Kozuki Oden. Ate the Inu Inu Fruit Model Okuchi no Makami. Fought alongside Luffy at Onigashima.

title: Kozuki Oden
desc: Former daimyo of Kuri in Wano and member of the Roger Pirates. Wielder of two swords. Executed by Kaido and Orochi.

title: Momonosuke
desc: Son of Kozuki Oden and rightful shogun of Wano. Accidentally ate an artificial Zoan Fruit allowing him to transform into a dragon.

title: Silvers Rayleigh
desc: The Dark King, first mate of the Roger Pirates. Trained Luffy in Haki for two years on Rusukaina island before Marineford.

title: last
desc: last
